nodes.name: CODEOWNERS
nodes.summary: GitHub CODEOWNERS file assigning code ownership for pull request review routing.

nodes.name: copilot-task.md
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for Copilot-assigned tasks with sections for description, acceptance criteria, and context.

nodes.name: .npmignore
nodes.summary: npm publish exclusion list preventing test files, CI scripts, and development artifacts from being included in the published package.

nodes.name: .tool-versions
nodes.summary: asdf tool version pinning file specifying runtime versions for Node.js, Python, and other tools used in the project.

nodes.name: commitlint.config.js
nodes.summary: Commitlint configuration enforcing conventional commit message format for the ECC repository.

nodes.name: github-native-coordination.json
nodes.summary: Configuration for GitHub-native workflow coordination including labels, review rules, branch model, and validation settings.

nodes.name: project-stack-mappings.json
nodes.summary: Large mapping of project technology stacks to ECC skill and rule sets, used for automatic stack detection and tooling selection.

nodes.name: ecc_dashboard.py
nodes.summary: Tkinter-based GUI dashboard for browsing ECC agents, skills, commands, and rules; the main entry point for the desktop management interface.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses tkinter with ttk widgets for a cross-platform desktop GUI. Imports runtime helpers from scripts/lib/ecc_dashboard_runtime.py.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat configuration for the ECC project, defining linting rules for JavaScript files.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the GAN-style harness examples, covering quick start, command usage, three-agent orchestration, custom evaluation criteria, and project-type settings.

nodes.name: hooks.json
nodes.summary: Main ECC hook configuration registry mapping hook events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, lifecycle) to their handler scripts.

nodes.name: hooks.json
nodes.summary: Hook configuration for the memory-persistence sub-module, wiring session lifecycle events to memory save and restore scripts.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the memory-persistence hook sub-module describing its lifecycle contract, operator expectations, and related files.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide to ECC's hook system covering available hooks, installation, customization, input schema, async hooks, and common recipes.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the AURA trust-check adapter integration, describing opt-in enablement, verdict types, policy knobs, failure behavior, and trust boundaries.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty Python package marker making the AURA tests directory a proper Python package.

nodes.name: THREAT_MODEL.md
nodes.summary: Threat model for the AURA trust-check adapter detailing verdict guarantees, explicit non-guarantees, failure modes, and data handled.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief documentation explaining the purpose of legacy command shims for backward compatibility.

nodes.name: mcp-servers.json
nodes.summary: MCP server configuration catalog defining available MCP server integrations and their connection parameters for Claude Code.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the ECC Codex repo-marketplace plugin target, describing the single-source-of-truth model and current Codex plugin-mode status.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Guide for using ECC plugins and marketplaces, covering how to add marketplaces, install plugins, and quick setup instructions.

nodes.name: ecc2-codebase-analysis.md
nodes.summary: Research report analyzing the ECC2 Rust codebase architecture, code quality metrics, identified gaps, test coverage, security observations, and prioritized recommendations.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the ECC rules system covering directory structure, installation options, rules vs skills distinction, adding new language rules, and rule priority.

nodes.name: ecc-agent-data.json
nodes.summary: Cursor scaffold configuration specifying the ECC agent data home directory path for Cursor IDE integration.

nodes.name: hooks.json
nodes.summary: Cursor scaffold hooks configuration template providing a minimal hooks.json skeleton for Cursor IDE integration.

nodes.name: load_agents
nodes.summary: Loads ECC agent definitions from the agents directory, parsing YAML frontmatter to extract name and purpose for display in the dashboard.

nodes.name: load_skills
nodes.summary: Loads ECC skill definitions from the skills directory, parsing categories and descriptions for display in the dashboard's skills tab.

nodes.name: load_commands
nodes.summary: Loads ECC slash command definitions from the commands directory for display in the dashboard.

nodes.name: load_rules
nodes.summary: Loads ECC rule files from the rules directory, organizing them by language subdirectory for the rules tab display.

nodes.name: ECCDashboard
nodes.summary: Main Tkinter application window for the ECC dashboard, providing tabbed views for agents, skills, commands, rules, and settings with search/filter capabilities.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that instantiates the ECCDashboard and starts the Tkinter main loop.
